# EVOLA

> EVOLA rents electric bikes and batteries in Wroclaw, Poland, converts standard bicycles into electric ones, and sells e-bike batteries. Rental periods start at 1 week with bike service included twice a week.

EVOLA offers two e-bike models for weekly rental (full suspension and hardtail, both with 30Ah batteries), standalone battery rentals (22–35Ah, 50–130 zl/week), battery sales (22–35Ah, 1200–2000 PLN, 1-year warranty), custom e-bike conversion/build services, and ready-made e-bike kits (250W–3000W). The site is available in three languages: Russian at `/` (default), English at `/en`, and Polish at `/pl`.

## Site (Russian, default)
- [Главная — Аренда электровелосипедов](https://evola.pl/): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Аренда](https://evola.pl/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Батареи — аренда и продажа](https://evola.pl/batteries): Battery rental (50–130 zł/week) and purchase (1200–2000 PLN) for 22/25/30/35Ah. Service included. 1-year warranty on purchase. FAQ.
- [Электрокомплекты](https://evola.pl/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).

## Site (English)
- [Home — Electric bike rental](https://evola.pl/en): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Rent](https://evola.pl/en/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Batteries — rent and buy](https://evola.pl/en/batteries): Battery rental (50–130 zl/week) and purchase (1200–2000 PLN) for 22/25/30/35Ah. Service included. 1-year warranty on purchase. FAQ.
- [Kits](https://evola.pl/en/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).

## Site (Polish)
- [Strona główna — Wynajem rowerów elektrycznych](https://evola.pl/pl): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Wynajem](https://evola.pl/pl/rent): Full rental landing page.
- [Baterie — wynajem i zakup](https://evola.pl/pl/batteries): Wynajem baterii (50–130 zł/tydz.) i zakup (1200–2000 PLN) dla 22/25/30/35Ah. Serwis w cenie. Gwarancja 1 rok przy zakupie. FAQ.
- [Zestawy](https://evola.pl/pl/kits): E-bike conversion kits (LITE 250W, BASE 500W, TURBO 3000W).
